Romanization

Streetlights dancing on your hair
Soft wind moving through the air
Every second slows around you
Like the world just stops right there
I was walking through the silence
Every night the same old sky
Then your voice cut through the darkness
Like a spark I can’t deny

Stay with me in this moment
Don’t let the feeling fade tonight
Your eyes pulling me closer
Like I’m falling into light
Every word you say is magic
Every breath feels warm and true
If the world keeps turning slowly
I just wanna turn with you
